name: PancakeSwap veCAKE
special_mechanism_summary: veCAKE was PancakeSwap's vote-escrowed CAKE mechanism (lock CAKE for up to 4 years, receive veCAKE for governance and emission direction over 2-week gauge epochs with up to 2.5x gauge boost). The veCAKE/gauge voting system was deprecated in April 2025 (Tokenomics 3.0), replaced with a simplified staking model; the historical gauge architecture remains relevant for BSC gauge-ve analysis.
notes: C3' combination potential: veCAKE gauge boost (1x to 2.5x) created predictable moments where boost dropped below threshold as veCRV-style time-decay accumulated, exploitable by bots monitoring gauge ratios; Tokenomics 3.0 deprecated the active gauge component in April 2025 — included as BSC gauge-ve representative based on historical architecture and aggregate $2.83B PancakeSwap TVL. sub-threshold accepted by user decision (veCAKE gauge system is deprecated; BSC gauge-ve gap — THENA has $4.36M TVL only, both are sub-threshold or deprecated).
